compressed_prompt:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
<<resignation notice>> to boss: quitting job
response:
Here is a professional resignation email to your boss:

---

**Subject: <<Resignation Notice>>**

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to formally inform you that I have decided to resign from my position at [Company Name], effective [last working date, typically two weeks from today].

This was not an easy decision to make, as I have truly valued my time here and the opportunities I have been given to grow both professionally and personally. I am grateful for your guidance, support, and leadership throughout my tenure.

I want to ensure a smooth transition and will do everything I can to wrap up my current projects and responsibilities before my departure. I am also happy to assist in training or onboarding my replacement if needed.

Please let me know how I can best support the team during this transition period. I would also appreciate the opportunity to discuss the next steps regarding my departure at your earliest convenience.

Thank you once again for the wonderful experience and opportunities. I wish you and the entire team continued success in the future.

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]

---

Feel free to customize the details to fit your specific situation.
